base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of compiler — a character (boss) from 1987 r type. Compiler — Stage-4 boss. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Compiler — Stage-4 boss; digital-mothership. Image download failed (asset may be broken on server)
